verdict.answer_first: A states the actionable answer in its first section header ('Interactive rebase'), while B uses a more general heading first ('Option 1').
verdict.decisiveness: A makes a direct recommendation ('The soft reset is usually the easiest'), while B presents two equally weighted options.
verdict.fabrication: B invents a detail about the user's environment: 'the current one (`/private/tmp`) isn't a git repo.'
verdict.actionability: B is more actionable because it shows an example of the editor content ('pick a1b2c3d First commit...') which removes ambiguity and prevents errors.
